# Assignment 3 Requirements Checklist

> Mark items `[x]` as they are completed.
> Live view: **/checklist/** (auto-updated on push to `main`)

---

## 1. Agent Loop

- [x] **AGENT1** — Custom agent loop implemented from scratch (no LangChain, CrewAI, or equivalent frameworks)
- [x] **AGENT2** — LLM integrated via API or self-hosted model
- [x] **AGENT3** — Planning step present in the agent loop (the agent reasons before calling tools)

---

## 2. Tools

- [x] **TOOL1** — First tool implemented and callable by the agent
- [x] **TOOL2** — Second tool implemented and callable by the agent
- [x] **TOOL3** — Third tool implemented and callable by the agent

---

## 3. User Interface

- [x] **UI1** — User interface built for interacting with the agent
- [x] **UI2** — Interface demo-able end-to-end (agent receives input, calls tools, returns response)

---

## 4. Evaluation

- [x] **EVAL1** — Evaluation approach designed and documented
- [x] **EVAL2** — Evaluation dataset or benchmark defined
- [x] **EVAL3** — Quantitative metric reported (e.g., accuracy, task completion rate, F1)
- [x] **EVAL4** — Results demonstrated with concrete numbers

---

## 5. Video

- [ ] **VID1** — Video explains agent goal and design choices
- [ ] **VID2** — Video shows the interface in action
- [ ] **VID3** — Video covers the evaluation and quantitative results
- [ ] **VID4** — Video is 6 minutes or under
- [ ] **VID5** — No code shown in video

---

## 6. GitHub Repository

- [x] **REPO1** — Repository is public or accessible to graders
- [x] **REPO2** — README includes full agent description and how to run it
- [ ] **REPO3** — Repository is well organized and suitable as a portfolio artifact
